differential_diagnoses: Major depressive disorder with postpartum onset
Adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
next_steps: Referral for cognitive behavioral therapy with an emphasis on exposure and response prevention (ERP)
Initiate standardized assessment using the Yale-Brown Obsessive Compulsive Scale (Y-BOCS) and the Edinburgh Postnatal Depression Scale (EPDS)
Obtain serum TSH and free T4 levels to rule out postpartum thyroiditis
Optimize pharmacotherapy: Consider a trial of a different high-dose SSRI or clomipramine, following the failed trial of sertraline
Develop a formal safety plan including 24/7 supervision of the infant by a trusted caregiver until symptoms improve
Provide psychoeducation to the patient and her partner regarding the nature of ego-dystonic intrusive thoughts to reduce shame and fear of child removal
